markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review December SEO performance and align on Q1 content priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Major Keyword Declines:** Diligent lost significant rankings for key GRC terms (e.g., "GRC tools" fell from \#1 to \#24), likely due to the December algorithm update.
  - [**Branded Impression Drop:** A 24–62% MoM drop in branded impressions (e.g., "Diligent 1 platform" -62%) suggests a non-SEO cause, like a paused marketing campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [**Q1 Content Strategy:** The plan is to refresh high-value content (GRC guide, AI governance) and create new listicles to capture competitor-held "best board software" queries.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [**Fathom Data Migration:** Diligent proposed migrating its Fathom data to a new, client-owned account with GrowthX editing access to centralize data and prevent reporting silos.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)

## Topics

### December SEO Performance Review

  - [**GRC Keyword Declines:** The December algorithm update caused major ranking losses for key GRC terms.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - "GRC tools": \#1 → \#24
      - "GRC risk management": \#10 → \#24
  - [**Branded Impression Drop:** Significant MoM impression losses for branded keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - ["Diligent Platform": -24%](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - ["Diligent 1 platform": -62%](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** A paused brand marketing campaign, not an SEO issue, is the likely cause.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:** SEMrush data shows Diligent held its Share of Voice.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
      - [**Significance:** Keyword losses were not to competitors, simplifying recovery efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)

### Q1 Content Strategy

  - **GRC Guide Refresh:** The guide page, which previously ranked \#1 for "GRC tools," will be refreshed to include a new "GRC tools" section.
  - [**AI Governance Article Refresh:** The "AI board governance" article will be refreshed to maintain ranking in a fast-moving topic.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will refresh the article. Kezia will ask SME Dale for new quotes, which will be added post-publication.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**"Speak Up" (Whistleblowing) Content:** Content for this acquired product will be woven into the Jan/Feb schedule, not prioritized over existing work.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Context:** The product is listed under "Vault" in the nav but has a different URL, which initially confused GrowthX's research.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**"Budget-Friendly Governance Software" Query:** Diligent will compete for this term to target smaller deals (e.g., school boards) and align with products like AI Risk Essential.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

### Inline Images & Branding

  - [**Tool:** GrowthX uses Nano Banana for AI-generated inline images.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [**Customization:** The tool replicates styles from a sample image.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Images are static (not editable like Canva files), so a new sample is needed for any brand updates.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Icons:** The tool can incorporate custom assets, including Diligent's Google Material Icons.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Fathom Data Migration

  - [**Proposal:** Diligent will create a new Fathom account and grant GrowthX full editing access.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Goal:** Centralize data and prevent reporting silos from two separate instances.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Risk:** This is a new process for GrowthX, requiring internal approval from Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [Check with Marcel on the Fathom data migration proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
      - [Send 4–5 questions to Kezia for SME Dale to update the AI governance article.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [Provide updates on "track terms" and older solution pages next week.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Confirm brand guidelines (logo, font) with the brand team for Nano Banana images.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [Ask SME Dale for new quotes for the AI governance article.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [Flag the branded impression drop to the Diligent brand marketing team.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Decide on next week's sync format (async update vs. call) by mid-week.](https://fathom.video/share/VCkKzVCzebcVinQ4J775brxS99KkkDTh?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
